//: External-agent SWERVE demo (B6). Car cruises at 13.89 m/s on the 6 m lane e0_0 (centre y=-3.00).
//1: A pedestrian jumps in 8 m ahead at t=10 (13.89*10+8 = 146.9 m), too close to stop, and LUNGES
//2: left across the lane at 2.5 m/s (latSpeed). width 1.2 = a partial footprint, so the engine's
//3: ComputeLateralEvasion makes the car SWERVE around it (dodging to the side the ped vacates)
//4: rather than stop dead. latPos/latSpeed are the REAL B6 lateral fields the engine reacts to.
